author: doll-agent
content: Added MinCategories enum (Scalar | PerFeature) plus with_min_categories(usize) and with_min_categories_per_feature(Vec<usize>) builders to CategoricalNB. fit() pre-pads categories[j] so count tables have slots for unseen values that may appear at predict / partial_fit time. Validated by api_proof_categorical_nb.
